root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# cp -a /bin/busybox /app/ramfs/rootfs/bin/busybox
root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# ln -sf /bin/busybox /app/ramfs/rootfs/bin/sh && ln -sf /bin/busybox /app/ramfs/rootfs/sbin/init && ln -sf /bin/busybox /
app/ramfs/rootfs/sbin/getty && ln -sf /bin/busybox /app/ramfs/rootfs/bin/login
root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# cat > /app/ramfs/rootfs/init << 'EOF'
> #!/bin/sh
> set -eu
> export PATH=/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin
> # Mount essential filesystems
> mount -t proc proc /proc || true
> mount -t sysfs sysfs /sys || true
> # Prefer devtmpfs if available, else ensure minimal nodes
> mount -t devtmpfs devtmpfs /dev 2>/dev/null || true
> [ -e /dev/console ] || mknod -m 600 /dev/console c 5 1
> [ -e /dev/null ]    || mknod -m 666 /dev/null    c 1 3
> [ -e /dev/tty ]     || mknod -m 666 /dev/tty     c 5 0
> [ -e /dev/ttyS0 ]   || mknod -m 600 /dev/ttyS0   c 4 64
> mkdir -p /dev/pts || true
> mount -t devpts devpts /dev/pts 2>/dev/null || true
> # Hand off to BusyBox init (reads /etc/inittab)
> exec /sbin/init
> EOF
root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# chmod +x /app/ramfs/rootfs/init
root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# cat > /app/ramfs/rootfs/etc/passwd << 'EOF'
> root:x:0:0:root:/root:/bin/sh
> EOF

> root::19000:0:99999:7:::
> EOF
root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# chmod 600 /app/ramfs/rootfs/etc/shadow
root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# cat > /app/ramfs/rootfs/etc/group << 'EOF'
> root:x:0:
> EOF
root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# cat > /app/ramfs/rootfs/etc/securetty << 'EOF'
> ttyS0
> console

> ::sysinit:/bin/echo "Initramfs starting..."
> ttyS0::respawn:/sbin/getty -L ttyS0 115200 vt100
> ::ctrlaltdel:/bin/echo "CTRL-ALT-DEL pressed"
> ::shutdown:/bin/umount -a -r
> EOF
